sentence.prefix: Die API prüft die Berechtigung anhand

messages.empty: Fill the blank with the article required by the authorization grammar rule.
messages.fill: Use `der` so the authorization anchor satisfies the lesson rule for `Benutzer-ID`.
messages.shape: Keep the sentence shape `Die API prüft die Berechtigung anhand der Benutzer-ID`.

peek.title: Peek: AuthorizationGrammar.pkl
peek.explanation: This lesson models the phrase `anhand ... Benutzer-ID` as a dative-governed authorization anchor that requires `der`.
